pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent POM to a version compatible with Java 17.
Set the target Java version property to 17 to enable compilation for the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Cloud version to align with the new Spring Boot release train.
Upgrade the Spring Boot Admin Server dependency to a version compatible with the new Spring Boot version.
Add Maven Surefire plugin configuration to handle unit test execution and exclusion of integration tests.
Add Maven Failsafe plugin configuration to handle integration test execution.
Add JaCoCo plugin configuration to generate code coverage reports for both unit and integration tests.
Add formatter plugin to enforce code style using Google Java Style.
Rename the project group ID to reflect a new domain structure.
Update the project artifact version to 2.0.1.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Rename the Spring Boot application name to reflect a new service identity.
